ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Type__c,'Rig'), OR(TEXT(Status__c) = 'Submitted',TEXT(Status__c) = 'Approved',TEXT(Status__c) = 'Invoiced'), OR(ISBLANK(No_of_KM_s_from_Previous_Site__c),ISBLANK(Line_on_Spool__c),ISBLANK(Line_Slipped__c)) ), TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Fields #No of KM's from Previous Site, Line on Spool & Line Slipped cannot be empty.
